TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pila', title = pila', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pila'} }

S.FORM: == pila' == 錢 ana si kpzyux pila' nya'. ungat ana qutux qu gnalu' nya' squliq ga, ungat zywaw nya'. - .
== pila' == 錢 ana si kpzyux pila' nya'. ungat ana qutux qu gnalu' nya' squliq ga, ungat zywaw nya'. - .
S.PHON: == pilaʔ == * ana s~ɕi kpzjux pilaʔ njaʔ. uŋat ana qutux qu ɣnaluʔ njaʔ s~ɕquliq ɣa, uŋat zjwaw njaʔ. - .
